raw_response: Based on the prior discussions and further evidence retrieval, it appears that ganglion cells remain the primary target in glaucomatous optic neuropathy. Research consistently indicates that damage to these neurons leads to visual field defects and structural changes observed clinically. Therefore, maintaining consistency with the initial assessment, I would still assert that \boxed{C} represents the correct option - ganglion cells being the key cellular targets in this condition.
